transcript:
Speaker A (Human): I have one doubt. Day after tomorrow wale din ko kya bolte hain? [I have one doubt. What do we call the day after tomorrow?]
Speaker B (AI): I have one doubt nahi, I have a question hota hai. [Not 'I have one doubt', it is 'I have a question'.]
Speaker A: Okay, okay.
Speaker B: And day after tomorrow wale din ko overmorrow bolte hain. [And the day after tomorrow is called overmorrow.]
Speaker A: Mujhe bhi English seekhni hai. Kaise seekhun? [I also want to learn English. How do I learn?]
Speaker B: Toh bas MySivi app install karo, and roz mere saath 15 minutes English practice karo. Bas kuch hi dino mein tumhari English achi ho jayegi. [So just install the MySivi app, and practice English with me for 15 minutes daily. In just a few days, your English will improve.]
Speaker A: Par yeh app toh mehenga hoga na? [But this app must be expensive, right?]
Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Tum sirf ek hi rupaye mein shuru kar sakte ho. [Not at all. You can start for just one rupee.]
Speaker A: Wah! Phir kaise start karoon? [Wow! Then how do I start?]
Speaker B: Bas install button par click karo, MySivi app install karo, and apni English journey shuru karo. [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start your English journey.]
on_screen_text: I HAVE / DAY / BOLTE / I HAVE / HOTA / OKAY / DIN KO / BOLTE / MUJHE BI / TOH / MySivi / ...INSTALL KARO / AND ROZ MERE SAATH / PRACTICE KARO. / BAS KUCH HI / ACHI HO JAYEGI. / PAR YEH / BILKUL NAHI. / RUPAY / WAH / KAROON? / BAS INSTALL / MYSIVI APP INSTALL / SHURU KARO. [I have / Day / Say / I have / Is / Okay / Day / Say / Me too / So / MySivi / ...Install / And daily with me / Practice. / Just a few / Will get better. / But this / Not at all. / Rupees / Wow / Do? / Just install / MySivi app install / Start.]
summary: A young man gets grammar corrections from an AI avatar, who then recommends the MySivi app for daily English practice. The ad highlights a special offer of 3 days of premium access for ₹1. It concludes with a call to action to install the app.
